name: Fireflies.ai
description: Meeting-bot notetaker with summaries and CRM integrations

developer.comment: Founded 2016 by Krish Ramineni (CEO) and Sam Udotong.

first-release.comment: Company founded July 2016; the AI notetaker product was developed and refined over the following years. Approximate first-release month given murky early product history.

status.comment: Actively developed and sold as of June 2026.

license.comment: Proprietary SaaS with a genuinely usable free tier.

primary-type.comment: Core job is a meeting-bot notetaker that joins calls, transcribes and summarizes; also transcribes uploaded files. Not a speak-to-type dictation tool.

real-time-dictation.comment: Produces live meeting notes but is not a speak-to-type input method that types into other apps.

file-transcription.comment: Supports audio/video file upload for transcription, available on all plans including Free.

live-meeting-capture.comment: Fred meeting bot joins Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams and 10+ other platforms to record and transcribe live.

streaming-low-latency.comment: Free plan includes real-time notes and live transcription during meetings.

audio-sources.comment: Meeting bot joins calls; mobile/desktop apps capture mic; audio/video files can be uploaded.

underlying-engine.comment: Fireflies does not publicly disclose its production transcription engine; it has worked with third-party ASR providers (e.g. AssemblyAI partnership) but the current engine is not documented. Not inferred per RESEARCH.md guidance.

english-accuracy.comment: Independent reviews report ~90-95% accuracy in good English audio (roughly 5-10% WER); degrades with background noise, cross-talk and heavy accents.

multilingual-auto-detect.comment: Vendor advertises Auto-Language Detection that switches languages from meeting to meeting automatically.

custom-vocabulary.comment: Supports a custom vocabulary / keyword tracker to improve recognition of names and domain terms.

speaker-diarization.comment: Automatic speaker separation/labeling; accuracy can struggle with large groups or overlapping speech.

timestamps.comment: Transcripts are timestamped and playback syncs to text; smart timestamps highlight key moments.

ai-summaries-notes.comment: Auto-generates AI summaries, action items and conversation intelligence; AskFred AI assistant answers questions about the transcript. Unlimited AI summaries even on Free.

built-in-editor.comment: In-app transcript review with editing, commenting, soundbites and highlights (text correction, not media-by-text editing).

translation.comment: Offers transcript translation into other languages alongside multilingual transcription.

export-formats.comment: Transcripts/summaries export as PDF, DOCX, SRT and JSON (plus CSV, which has no defined tag); SRT export covered. Download available on Pro and higher.

processing-location.comment: Cloud-only SaaS; data encrypted with 256-bit AES at rest and TLS in transit. No on-device option (Enterprise can choose private storage location).

offline-capable.comment: Cloud service; requires a network connection to record and transcribe.

data-used-for-training.comment: Fireflies states meeting content is never used to train AI models and enforces a 0-day retention policy with vendors. Checked June 2026.

data-deletion-control.comment: Users retain full control and can delete transcripts/recordings anytime; Enterprise adds custom data retention.

platforms.comment: Web app, iOS and Android apps, desktop apps (macOS/Windows) and a Chrome extension.

system-wide-dictation.comment: Not a dictation tool; does not inject text OS-wide into other apps.

integrations.comment: Native Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams (10+ conferencing platforms); Slack, Notion, Google Docs, Google/Outlook Calendar, and CRMs (Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Zoho, etc.) plus Zapier/Make.

api-automation.comment: API access available on all plans, including Free; GraphQL API and Zapier/Make automation.

pricing-model.comment: Free tier plus paid monthly/annual subscriptions; paid plans add an AI-credits system for AI features.

free-tier.comment: Free plan is an ongoing plan, not a time-limited trial.

free-allowance.value: Unlimited transcription + unlimited AI summaries; 400 min storage/team, 2-hour recording limit
free-allowance.comment: Checked June 2026. Includes real-time notes, AskFred, file upload and API access; storage capped at 400 minutes per team.

entry-price-usd-mo.comment: Pro plan: $10/seat/mo billed annually, or $18/seat/mo billed monthly. Checked June 2026.
